title: Meet the Dark Alpha Team: Driving Innovation and Excellence | Dark Alpha Capital
content:
# Meet the Team

We aim to help our companies grow their businesses with the right capital partners and relationships that are aligned with their growth.

[SET AN APPOINTMENT](https://calendly.com/darkalphacapital)
